info.name: Techa Marketplace — Auth API
info.description:
Techa Marketplace API — Full Collection

**Customer Auth** (`{{base_url}}/api/auth`): Register, Login, Verify Email, Forgot/Reset Password
**Admin Auth** (`{{base_url}}/api/admin`): Login, Profile, Logout, CRUD
**Admin Categories** (`{{base_url}}/api/admin/categories`): CRUD
**Admin Brands** (`{{base_url}}/api/admin/brands`): CRUD
**Admin Tags** (`{{base_url}}/api/admin/tags`): CRUD
**Admin Coupons** (`{{base_url}}/api/admin/coupons`): CRUD
**Admin Delivery Zones** (`{{base_url}}/api/admin/delivery-zones`): CRUD + Rates management
**Admin Orders** (`{{base_url}}/api/admin/orders`): List, Detail, Status Update, Stats
**Categories** (`{{base_url}}/api/categories`): Public tree & single category
**Brands** (`{{base_url}}/api/brands`): Public brand list
**Delivery Zones (Public)** (`{{base_url}}/api/public/delivery-zones`): Active zones list
**Shipping** (`{{base_url}}/api/shipping`): Customer rate lookup
**Addresses** (`{{base_url}}/api/addresses`): Customer CRUD + Set Default
**Cart** (`{{base_url}}/api/cart`): View, add items, update qty, remove items, apply/remove coupon
**Orders** (`{{base_url}}/api/orders`): Place Order, List Own, Detail, Cancel

**Environment variables:**
- `base_url`: e.g. `http://localhost:3000`
- `auth_token`: set automatically via customer Login
- `admin_token`: set automatically via Admin Auth > Login

exec: pm.expect(token, "token was not found in response").to.exist;

request.description: Returns all delivery zones (active and inactive).
Returns a zone with its associated rates.
Create a new delivery zone with a name and city/region list.
Update a zone's name, regions, or active status.
Soft-deletes a zone and deactivates all its shipping rates.
Returns all shipping rates for a specific zone.
Add a shipping rate to a zone.
Update a shipping rate's fields.
Soft-deletes a shipping rate.

query.description: Filter by status (pending, confirmed, processing, shipped, delivered, cancelled, refunded)
Filter by payment status (pending, paid, failed, refunded)

request.description: Returns paginated list of all orders. Supports filtering by status, payment_status, date range, and user ID.
Returns full order detail with items, status history, customer info, and payment info.
Updates order status. Valid transitions: pending→confirmed, confirmed→processing, processing→shipped, shipped→delivered. Cancellation and refund also supported.
Returns total orders, total revenue (excl. cancelled/refunded), and breakdown by status.
Returns paginated list of payments awaiting admin review, with order and customer info.
Approves a pending payment. Advances order to confirmed, sets payment_status to paid.
Rejects a pending payment. Sets payment_status to failed without changing order lifecycle status.
Creates a product with inline variants and images.
Updates product with inline variant create/update/destroy and image creation.
Soft-deletes (deactivates) a product.
Adds a new variant to a product.
Updates a variant (optimistic locking via version).
Soft-deletes (deactivates) a variant.
Adds a new image to a product.
Removes a product image.
Adds an image to a specific variant.
Removes an image from a variant.
Send a notification to a specific user (type cannot be order_*).
Broadcast a system notification to all active users. Rate-limited to 1 per minute.
Returns all site settings grouped by their `group` field. Requires settings.read permission.
Bulk updates setting values. Only existing keys are updated; unknown keys are returned as not_found. Requires settings.update permission.
Returns all banners (no date filtering). Requires content.read permission.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Summer Sale",
  "description": "Get 50% off on all items",
  "image_url": "https://cdn.example.com/banners/summer.jpg",
  "link_url": "https://techa.com/sale",
  "position": "hero",
  "sort_order": 1,
  "starts_at": "2026-06-01T00:00:00Z",
  "ends_at": "2026-07-01T00:00:00Z",
  "is_active": true
}

request.description: Creates a new banner. title, image_url, position are required. Requires content.create permission.
Updates a banner. All fields are optional on update. Requires content.update permission.
Hard-deletes a banner by ID. Requires content.delete permission.
Returns public site settings (site_name, logo_url, currency, instapay_handle, vodafone_cash_number). No authentication required.

query.description: Optional. Filter by position: hero, mid_page, sidebar, popup

request.description: Returns active banners (is_active=true, within schedule). Optional position query param to filter by location.
Create a new customer account. Sends a 6-digit verification code to the provided email.

request.description: Returns the full nested category tree (active categories only), ordered by sort_order.
Returns a single category with its immediate active children.
Returns all active brands as a flat list, ordered by name.
Paginated product list with filtering and sorting.
Returns full product details including attributes, variants, images, and reviews.
Returns paginated reviews for a product (public, no auth required).
Create a review for a product. Requires a delivered order. Optionally link to an order_item_id for verified status.
Update your own review (rating and/or comment).
Soft-delete your own review.
List all reviews (including inactive). Filter by product_id, rating, or is_active.
Admin can soft-delete any review.
Returns the current user's wishlist items.
Add a product (optionally a variant) to the wishlist.
Remove an item from the wishlist.
Returns paginated notifications for the current user.
Mark a single notification as read.
Mark all notifications as read.
Returns all active delivery zones (no auth required).
Returns the cheapest active shipping rate for a customer's address.
Returns the current user's cart with items, totals, price-changed detection, and applied coupon.
Adds a product (with optional variant) to the cart. If the same product+variant exists, increments qty.
Updates the quantity of a cart item. Stock is re-validated.
Removes an item from the cart and recalculates totals.
Applies a coupon code to the cart. Discount is applied to eligible items.
Removes the applied coupon from the cart and resets totals.

body.raw:
{
  "full_name": "John Doe",
  "phone": "+201234567890",

  "city": "Cairo",
  "zone_id": "<zone-uuid>",
  "label": "Home",
  "building": "Building 5",
  "apartment": "Apt 3B",
  "landmark": "Near mosque",
  "notes": "Leave with guard"
}

request.description: Places an order from the current cart. Validates stock, snapshots prices, calculates shipping, and creates the order. Payment methods: cash_on_delivery, instapay, vodafone_cash.
Returns the authenticated customer's orders, paginated.
Returns order detail with items and status history.
Cancels an order (only when status is pending or confirmed). Stock is restored.
Submits payment proof for a manual payment order (Instapay/Vodafone Cash). Order must be pending and owned by the customer.
Returns active Instapay handle and Vodafone Cash number for manual payments. Public endpoint, no auth required.
